login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account.
login.quote: The seamless booking experience and premium vehicles make City Airport Taxis our first choice for corporate travel across Belgium. Reliability you can trust.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join City Airport Taxis for premium airport transfers across Belgium.
register.quote: Join thousands of travelers who trust City Airport Taxis for airport transfers across Brussels, Antwerp, Charleroi, and beyond. Excellence is just a ride away.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password?
forgot_password.subtitle: No worries, we'll send you reset instructions.
forgot_password.quote: Security and trust are the foundation of our service. We ensure your data is as protected as your journey with us.

reset_password.title: Set new password
reset_password.subtitle: Your new password must be different from previously used passwords.
reset_password.quote: Every new journey begins with a single step. We're here to ensure every mile is as comfortable as the first.

errors.token_missing: Reset token is missing. Please use the link from your email.
